name: Why does Siri give worse local results when I use it in Denver or Austin?
description: Local Siri results depend on correct region, location services, and map permissions. Check those first.

mainEntity.name: Why does Siri give worse local results when I use it in Denver or Austin?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your Siri results depend on local places, make sure Location Services, region, and map-related permissions are correct. That matters more when searching for nearby businesses, routes, or city-specific results than when using generic reminders or messages.
acceptedAnswer.description: Local Siri results depend on correct region, location services, and map permissions. Check those first.
